a: To enroll, open the course page and click 'Enroll' or visit your dashboard and choose 'Enroll' next to the course.
Use the 'Forgot password' link on the login page and follow the instructions sent to your email.
We accept major credit/debit cards and PayPal. For corporate invoices or bank transfers please contact support.

q: how do i get a certificate
a: Certificates are issued after you complete the required course assignments and reach the passing criteria. Visit your dashboard > Certificates to download.
Refund policies vary by course. Please check the course terms or contact support with your enrollment details to request a refund.
You can contact support via the contact form on our website or email support@lms.com with your account and course details.

q: how long does a course take
a: Course durations are listed on each course page under 'Duration'. Self-paced courses depend on your study time; instructor-led courses show the schedule.
Prerequisites (if any) are shown on the course page. Some advanced courses require prior knowledge — check the 'Prerequisites' section.

q: how to change my profile picture
a: Go to Profile > Edit > Upload Avatar and choose an image. The site will generate thumbnails for display.
Open the specific course > Assignments section, upload your file or paste the required text, then click Submit. Confirm the submission appears in 'Submissions'.
Some courses provide downloadable materials in the Study Content area. Check the course modules for resources marked as downloads.

q: how do i track my progress
a: Your progress is shown on the course page and in My Enrollments. We update progress when you complete lessons and quizzes.

q: what if i forget my username
a: If you forget your username, use the login page help or contact support with the email used for registration and we'll assist.
While logged in, go to Settings > Change Password. If you forgot it, use 'Forgot password' on the login page to reset via email.
We currently offer a mobile-responsive site. If a native app is available, it will be announced on our homepage and in your account.
For group enrollments or corporate training, contact sales@lms.com with the number of learners and desired courses.
Invoices are available after payment. Check your account billing section or request an invoice from support with your order details.
Official transcripts can be requested via support. For completed course records, visit your certificates or transcripts section in the dashboard.
If a course page isn't loading, try clearing your browser cache, using a supported browser, or contact support with a screenshot and the course link.

q: why is my video not playing
a: Video playback issues are often due to browser settings or network restrictions. Try a different browser, disable extensions, or check your network firewall.
Quizzes are graded automatically based on correct answers. Some assessments are manually graded by instructors — results will appear in your dashboard.
Instructor contact info (if provided) is on the course page. Otherwise, post your question in the course forum or contact support to forward a message.
Most certificates do not expire unless stated. Check the certificate details for any expiry or revision requirements.
Go to Account > Billing to update payment methods or billing address. For invoices, contact support if you need historical documents.
We aim to meet accessibility standards. If you need assistance (captions, transcripts, alt text), contact support and we'll help make content accessible.
Apply promo codes during checkout on the payment page. Only one promo code may be applied per purchase unless stated otherwise.
To delete your account, contact support. Note that deleting an account will remove your course history and cannot always be undone.
Receipts are sent to your registered email after payment and are also available in the billing section of your account.
